body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/supplier/batch-update

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/supplier/batch-update

接口描述

批量更新供应商，一个批次最大支持50个供应商进行批量修改，修改时，根据传入的uniqueKey去匹配已经存在的供应商编号

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableOrgCodeList","label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%9D%A5%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%9A%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA-%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%0A%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%0A%E8%8B%A5availableOrgIdList%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%9C%ACCode%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22Fx00000%22%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableOrgIdList","label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8Id%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","desc":"%20%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE%E6%9D%A5%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%9A%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA-%E5%AF%BC%E5%87%BA%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%0A%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8id%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%0A%20%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8id%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22CORx80000%22%5D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgType","label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%201-%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%200-%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","re
